title: thelypteris simplex
intro: Thelypteris simplex, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris simplex include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of Thelypteris simplex include teas, infusions, and poultices, which are typically made by steeping the leaves in hot water or applying them directly to the affected area.
